productDisplayName: Marvel Boys Yellow and Orange Slippers
description: Style Note Featuring your little boy's favourite cartoon characters, this pair of sandals from marvel will be an instant hit. With a grippy outsole and footbed, these sandals offer unparalleled comfort to your little one's feet. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for a hot summer day. Product Details Yellow and orange sandals with badges featuring Marvel heroes on upper Yellow ankle straps with branding, one piece foamy rubber upper and outsole Grooves on outsole with branding Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteFeaturing your little boy's favourite cartoon characters, this pair of sandals from Marvel will be an instant hit.
